heading: New Jersey
label: 110 New Jersey
text: New Jersey constitutes one judicial district.Court shall be held at Camden, Newark and Trenton.
notes: Historical and Revision NotesBased on title 28, U.S.C., 1940 ed., § 176 (, ; , ; , ; , ).Mar. 3, 1911, ch. 231, § 9636 Stat. 1119Aug. 9, 1912, ch. 27737 Stat. 265Feb. 14, 1913, ch. 5337 Stat. 674May 17, 1926, ch. 31144 Stat. 561Provisions relating to maintenance of offices by the clerk and marshal were omitted as covered by sections 452, 541 [see 561], 542 [see 561], and 751 of this title.Changes in arrangement and phraseology were made.
